text: The first image gives me a sense of anticipation mixed with detachment—a sterile, glass-walled meeting room evokes both possibility and distance, as if I am about to cross from the outside world into a focused bubble of exchange or observation. In the second image, the bright graphics and reflective text create an environment that feels both intriguing and slightly overwhelming—it invites curiosity, and yet, reading the words about misunderstanding and exposure, I reflect on my own presence: do I belong here, or am I, too, just another observer on display? I feel a mixture of curiosity, self-awareness, and a slight alienation; I am both participant and outsider.
